title: Acharya
subTitle: On behalf of an idyllic temple town, Acharya takes up the cudgels against a tyrant whose greedy sights are set on the local natural resources.

title: Manjulika Returns
subTitle: A struggling actor manages to get a lead role in a movie. When the shooting commences, the crew begins to experience paranormal activities on the set.

title: Mach Gaya Tahalka

subTitle: To succeed in the film industry, Myra chooses Bachchhan Paandey, a notorious hooligan, as the main focus of her new movie. Things get complicated when the gangster decides to act in the film.

subTitle: Harsha is the idealistic scion of a self-made multimillionaire, Ravikanth. After a chance meeting with Charuseela leads him to a remote village, Harsha wishes to develop it with her help.

title: Bangarraju
subTitle: A deceased couple returns to Earth to help their grandson, who lost his way in life after familial and personal problems start to haunt him.

subTitle: A charitable trust faces threats from a powerful mafia leader who has set his eyes on its land. He plans to kill the legal heir to grab the wealth, but a brave taxi driver becomes an impediment.

title: Escape of Shark
subTitle: After a tsunami suddenly attacks, a beach party turns into a nightmare as the hotel is submerged in the sea. All the partygoers must find a way to survive when a giant shark starts hunting them.

title: Chasing
subTitle: A police officer saves a girl from being kidnapped and later looks into her failed abduction. Although the motive for the crime initially seems unclear, the clues soon lead her to a drug mafia.

subTitle: A budding cricketer bets big to fund his father's surgery but is betrayed by a bookie. Seeking revenge, he lands on a crime website, facing unexpected dangers that test his resolve.

title: Kasam Paida Karne Wale Ki
subTitle: Aarti's husband gets killed by his paternal uncle in order to usurp his wealth and estate. She swears on her unborn child to avenge his death.

title: Police Power
subTitle: A police officer tries to change his younger brother, who turns to a life of crime, but he fails. He then takes on the local gangster responsible for inciting youngsters towards crime.

title: Rowdy Rakshak
subTitle: A special agent is assigned to protect the prime minister, who later gets assassinated. He is tasked with finding the group responsible for the assassination.

title: Big Snake King
subTitle: After they slight a giant snake and disturb its slumber, the people of a village engage in a desperate ploy of human sacrifice to stay safe.
